CARMEN JOY
9 high definition widescreen wmv video uploaded
 

 

 

CARMEN's first video

carmen gets a sound telling off for failing her drivers test again

c Carmen joy maintenance discipline

 

We are delighted to introduce a new girl to our RLS ever growing team.

Meet the gorgeous 24 year old Carmen Joy

She is a close friend of our Ivey and Carmen feels that she would benefit from a firm hand in her life.

Carmen confessed that she had failed her drivers test again!

So she had to be grounded again!

As we allways do, we tell our girls to contact us regularly to report any bad behaviours to us
and a suitable punishment will follow

Carmen Joy has slipped into her old ways again so her privileges were revoked again.

She was grounded and her allowance was docked for failing her drivers test again.

And she got corner after each infarction!

 

 

 

 

 

 

CARMEN's DISCIPLINE CONTINUES!

   

 

Sometimes it is time to take a naughty young madam to the woods

This is the case with Carmen. She has neglected her domestic duties so I took her outside and disciplined her in the woods.
